Patch Set 2:

Tested on Integration-OOM-Staging-Daily in Windriver lab

Patch Set 2:

The image name problem is due to an incompatibility between the script that integration uses to change all of the image versions in the Helm charts and the way the inventory (and service change handler) Helm charts are written.   We are looking at changes to charts so that the integration script will not generate bad image tags.

Patch Set 2:

I see image version appears correct in Helm charts file after ONAP is deployed, which means integration script overrides image version correctly. Maybe you mean OOM ONAP deployment script has issue?

Patch Set 2:

Now I understand what Jack was saying about the incompatibility of overridden image version by Integration and image version constructed in charts template. We should have a short meeting today to find a solution/workaround to unblock integration testing
